requirement_topic.en: EAC and EDC Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and EAC Licensing Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EAC及EDC BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及EAC许可要求
requirement_topic.zht: EAC及EDC BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及EAC許可要求

summary.en: The Electricity Authority of Cambodia (EAC) — operating under the Law on Electricity (2001) — is the electricity regulator and licensor in Cambodia. EAC issues licences for the generation, transmission, distribution, import/export, and sale of electricity, and its licensing scope covers grid-connected energy storage assets. All grid-connected BESS installations — whether utility-scale or behind-the-meter — require formal EAC licensing and grid-connection approval before commissioning. EDC (Electricité du Cambodge), Cambodia's main national utility, owns and operates the transmission and distribution network in most of Cambodia; behind-the-meter and grid-scale BESS systems interconnecting with the EDC network require EDC grid-connection technical approval in addition to EAC licensing. Cambodia's grid operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be designed, configured, and validated for Cambodia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series, including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for grid-integrated electrochemical-based systems), is the IEC-based reference framework expected in project and EAC/EDC technical specifications. A publicly accessible EAC or EDC technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms and licence conditions must be obtained directly from EAC (eac.gov.kh) and EDC (edc.com.kh).
summary.zh: 柬埔寨电力管理局（EAC）依据《电力法》（2001年）运作，是柬埔寨的电力监管机构和许可机关。EAC为电力的发电、输电、配电、进出口和销售颁发许可证，其许可范围涵盖并网储能资产。所有并网BESS装置——无论是公用事业规模还是表后项目——在投运前均须取得正式EAC许可证和并网批准。EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）是柬埔寨主要国家公用事业单位，拥有并运营柬埔寨大部分地区的输配电网；接入EDC电网的表后和并网规模BESS系统，除EAC许可外，还须取得EDC并网技术批准。柬埔寨电网运行参数为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。BESS储能变流器（PCS）须针对柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行设计、配置和验证。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2（并网电化学系统安全要求），是项目及EAC/EDC技术规格中预期采用的IEC参考框架。截至本数据集日期，EAC或EDC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件尚未得到确认；项目专属并网协议条款和许可条件须直接向EAC（eac.gov.kh）和EDC（edc.com.kh）获取。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨電力管理局（EAC）依據《電力法》（2001年）運作，是柬埔寨的電力監管機構和許可機關。EAC為電力的發電、輸電、配電、進出口和銷售頒發許可證，其許可範圍涵蓋併網儲能資產。所有併網BESS裝置——無論是公用事業規模還是表後項目——在投運前均須取得正式EAC許可證和併網批准。EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）是柬埔寨主要國家公用事業單位，擁有並運營柬埔寨大部分地區的輸配電網；接入EDC電網的表後和併網規模BESS系統，除EAC許可外，還須取得EDC併網技術批准。柬埔寨電網運行參數為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須針對柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行設計、配置和驗證。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2（併網電化學系統安全要求），是項目及EAC/EDC技術規格中預期採用的IEC參考框架。截至本數據集日期，EAC或EDC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件尚未得到確認；項目專屬併網協議條款和許可條件須直接向EAC（eac.gov.kh）和EDC（edc.com.kh）獲取。

standards_or_laws: Law on Electricity (2001, Cambodia) — establishes EAC as the electricity regulator and licensor
EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) — licensing authority for grid-connected energy storage assets; eac.gov.kh
EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) — national utility; grid-connection technical approval required for interconnection; edc.com.kh
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62477-1 — Safety Requirements for Power Electronic Converter Systems and Equipment (applicable to BESS PCS)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Cambodia's 230/400 V. PCS firmware and protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Cambodia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning. Chinese GB/T standards and CQC/CCC marks are not recognised by EAC or EDC as equivalent to IEC 62933 evidence.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与柬埔寨230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。中国GB/T标准和CQC/CCC标志不被EAC或EDC认可为IEC 62933证据的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與柬埔寨230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。中國GB/T標準和CQC/CCC標誌不被EAC或EDC認可為IEC 62933證據的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy EAC licensing or EDC grid-connection requirements in Cambodia. Key issues requiring attention: (a) EAC licence — obtain EAC energy storage licence before installation; the licence category and conditions for grid-connected BESS are project-specific and must be confirmed directly with EAC (eac.gov.kh); (b) EDC technical approval — engage EDC (edc.com.kh) at the earliest project stage to obtain grid-connection technical requirements before equipment procurement is finalised; (c) grid voltage — Cambodia is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for Cambodia's grid parameters; (d) IEC 62933 series compliance — prepare IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 test and design documentation as expected by project specifications and EAC/EDC technical review, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA / communication interface protocol required by EDC for BESS monitoring before equipment specification is finalised.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足柬埔寨EAC许可或EDC并网要求。需注意的主要事项：（a）EAC许可证——在安装前取得EAC储能许可证；并网BESS的许可类别和条件因项目而异，须直接向EAC（eac.gov.kh）确认；（b）EDC技术批准——在设备采购最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与EDC（edc.com.kh）接触以获取并网技术要求；（c）电网电压——柬埔寨为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并针对柬埔寨电网参数重新测试；（d）IEC 62933系列合规——按项目规格和EAC/EDC技术审查的要求准备IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2测试和设计文件，因为中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）通信协议——在设备规格最终确定前，确认EDC对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足柬埔寨EAC許可或EDC併網要求。需注意的主要事項：（a）EAC許可證——在安裝前取得EAC儲能許可證；併網BESS的許可類別和條件因項目而異，須直接向EAC（eac.gov.kh）確認；（b）EDC技術批准——在設備採購最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與EDC（edc.com.kh）接觸以獲取併網技術要求；（c）電網電壓——柬埔寨為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並針對柬埔寨電網參數重新測試；（d）IEC 62933系列合規——按項目規格和EAC/EDC技術審查的要求準備IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2測試和設計文件，因為中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）通訊協議——在設備規格最終確定前，確認EDC對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC licence required for all grid-connected energy storage in Cambodia; EDC grid-connection technical approval required for systems interconnecting with the EDC network; specific technical requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed directly with EAC and EDC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Cambodia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy EAC licensing or EDC grid-connection requirements in Cambodia. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Cambodia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid. Engage EAC and EDC at the earliest project stage to determine licence requirements, connection agreement technical conditions, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. No publicly accessible EAC or EDC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement with EAC (eac.gov.kh) and EDC (edc.com.kh) is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足柬埔寨EAC许可或EDC并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对柬埔寨230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置。应在项目最早阶段与EAC和EDC接触，确定许可要求、并网协议技术条件、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EAC或EDC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与EAC（eac.gov.kh）和EDC（edc.com.kh）接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足柬埔寨EAC許可或EDC併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對柬埔寨230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置。應在項目最早階段與EAC和EDC接觸，確定許可要求、併網協議技術條件、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EAC或EDC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與EAC（eac.gov.kh）和EDC（edc.com.kh）接觸至關重要。
